description_long: This is a suburban-style bungalow with a brown gabled roof and a two-story section on one side, featuring a balcony with railings. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, a main entrance door, and a large window. The property is bordered by a small lawn and a paved sidewalk, with a driveway leading to a garage on the left. The exterior walls are painted a light beige with red brick trim along the base, and the windows are framed in blue. A small, stylized UFO hovers over the driveway, adding a whimsical touch to the otherwise traditional residential setting.
description: A beige and brown suburban bungalow with a gabled roof, two-story section, porch, garage, and a whimsical UFO on the driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, main entrance, garage, lawn, and the UFO on the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain wall of the two-story section and the driveway with the UFO.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porch area, rear windows, and the extended roofline.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side of the garage, two-story section, and the UFO on the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
